_meta.note: This file is the source of truth for product data. Edit here OR in the Google Sheets Master Hub. Changes here deploy instantly on next page load.

products.name: PRML TAP CARD
products.shortDesc: One tap. Your name, socials, site — every contact gets it instantly. No app. No subscription. Forever.
products.fullDesc: You hand someone your number — they forget it. You hand them the TAP CARD — they never lose you. One tap on any iPhone or Android. Your full digital identity delivered instantly. Set your profile once, update it anytime from your phone. No paper. No reprints. No app needed on their end. This is the last business card you'll ever need.

hormozi.hook: Stop handing out cards people throw away.
hormozi.who: For networkers, creatives, entrepreneurs, and anyone serious about not being forgotten.
hormozi.result: One tap and your complete profile is on their phone — forever.

products.name: PRML TAP CARD
products.shortDesc: Your brand. Your name. Engraved on a premium NFC card — custom designed, one-of-a-kind.
products.fullDesc: Same instant one-tap technology as the standard TAP CARD — but fully custom. Your logo, name, or design laser-engraved on a premium matte finish card. Designed by the PRML team. Ships within 5–7 business days. Limited slots available per month.

hormozi.hook: Most people hand out the same card. You won't.
hormozi.who: For executives, artists, brand owners, and anyone who refuses to be ordinary.
hormozi.result: A card that looks like a statement piece — and works like a superpower.
hormozi.urgency: Limited slots each month. Inquire to reserve.

products.name: PRML TAP CARD
products.shortDesc: Equip your entire team. 10 TAP CARDs, mix colors, profiles set up for everyone.
products.fullDesc: Ten TAP CARDs — mix Charcoal and Beige however you want. Perfect for teams, events, conferences, and corporate gifting. Full profile setup included for all 10. That's 10 people showing up like pros, every time. At $27.99 each that would be $279.90 — you pay $279.99 and get the setup free. Best value for teams.

hormozi.hook: One person with a TAP CARD stands out. A whole team? Unstoppable.
hormozi.who: For companies, agencies, event organizers, and team leads who don't do mediocre.
hormozi.result: 10 people connected, branded, and never forgotten. Setup included.
hormozi.urgency: Save $120 off individual pricing. Setup free. Ship in 3–5 days.

products.name: PRML TAP KEY
products.shortDesc: Your entire network — on your keyring. One tap from your keys, every time.
products.fullDesc: The TAP KEY clips right onto your keychain. You always have your keys. Now you always have your network. One tap from your keyring connects anyone to your full digital profile. No phone to unlock. No app to open. Just tap. Same technology as the TAP CARD — now always within reach.

hormozi.hook: You never leave without your keys. Now you never leave without your network.
hormozi.who: For people always on the move — events, shows, the street, the gym.
hormozi.result: Tap from your keychain. Your full profile delivered instantly.

products.name: PRML TAP KEY
products.shortDesc: 10 TAP KEYs for your crew. Mix colors. Everyone connected, everywhere.
products.fullDesc: Ten TAP KEYs — mix Charcoal and Beige. Your whole team, always connected, wherever they go. Perfect for crews, brands, event staff, and corporate gifting. Full profile setup included for all 10. That's $29.99 each individually — you pay $219.99 and save $80.

hormozi.hook: Your team leaves events. Their connections shouldn't.
hormozi.who: For teams, crews, event brands, and growing companies.
hormozi.result: 10 people networked and never forgotten. Setup included. Ships in 3–5 days.
